#### What's Changed

- Bump github.com/ulikunitz/xz from 0.5.13 to 0.5.14 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​308](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/308)
- Bump github.com/docker/docker from 28.2.2+incompatible to 28.3.3+incompatible by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​309](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/309)
- Implicitly declare built-in ARGs in the Containerfile heading by [@​NotSoFancyName](https://redirect.github.com/NotSoFancyName) in [#​312](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/312)

#### New Contributors

- [@​NotSoFancyName](https://redirect.github.com/NotSoFancyName) made their first contribution in [#​312](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/312)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.17...v1.2.18>
